name: offer-os
description: Offer OS — a numbered family of marketing skills covering the complete funnel: 8 build the content engine (attract) -> 1 define the problem -> 2 position the opportunity -> 3 build your frameworks -> 4 build the offer -> 5 build the funnel -> 6 add the software layer -> 7 launch the campaign -> 9 close with emotion (convert). The 7 Offer OS stations build the offer; stations 8 and 9 are the attract/convert bookends. Config-driven and portable across businesses. Ships the /marketing-360 complete full-funnel audit. Distills widely-taught direct-response, organic-content, and persuasion principles into reusable, business-agnostic skills.
